Recent updates in NYC include subway delays due to a fatal incident, a deadly crash involving an FDNY firetruck, and a vacant house collapse in Newark prompting evacuations. Additionally, a proposed minimum wage increase to $30 and a new law for basement apartments are under consideration.

### Risks & Alerts

- Several NYC subway lines are delayed after man is hit by train, MTA reports. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Brooklyn chain-reaction crash involving FDNY firetruck, Access-A-Ride van, Lexus, leaves 1 dead, several injured. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Neighbors evacuate after vacant house collapses in Newark. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxQTXJRSVpFeEJYNGZWdGpPS3kxUk92RGlLdTBleGRKbkJZUU5FdjBVMC1HRkl3OWFSWTFBNXZGR1ZKY1BPekREUG1vUWwzeW9yc3NiNFlhaEgtdHpwd3NwNW9xX3Z4YnFCbGE5T0hhbTkzaW1MbWtNdkk0N1Nqd2k3SzlhUmlQTEplT3FQWkZiOF9HNG1nS1h5WGJR?oc=5)
- Seafood sold in NY recalled for possible norovirus contamination: FDA. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Earthquake reported in New York: USGS. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- City Council advances Bronx lawmaker’s bill cementing City of Yes legalization of basement apartments, tiny houses. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC’s minimum wage could hit $30 — highest in the US — under new proposed law. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxPMmlrRE1KbnhTRS1WeGNUZ0dNWGV5cGI3S2trM0ZqRnVXMlg0eW5zelZDMkVCWFhSMk5fTmdTanBPTkN6djg2UEJ4SHlrUDF5V0piQmY5QndtUmlrUWVyc3UzdlloZFdQczRNendkOXFQYkNzc1dYcE5uQW1lY0VkbE1HemtqbmJ0emE0R3lPclZwYjJUSWZB?oc=5)
- Mamdani halts NYC's 'predatory' private tax lien sale process. - Mamdani doesn’t need to raid NYC’s ‘rainy day’ fund to close $5.4B budget gap: City Council. ### Opportunities & Welfare

- NYC will increase free child care seats for 3-year-olds in specific ZIP codes. - Assemblymember Emerita Torres has allocated $65K for afterschool programming in the South Bronx. - Pod of dolphins spotted in NYC’s East River, surprising experts with their rare visit.
